title: Trump says Iran called to make a deal after U.S. strikes; adds it's unclear if war is back on
summary_full: When asked whether the U.S. and Iran are returning to a full-scale military conflict, Trump responded: "I don't know."
summary_public: When asked whether the U.S. and Iran are returning to a full-scale military conflict, Trump responded: "I don't know."

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump says Iran called to make a deal after U.S. strikes
